hero.tagline: Empower your business with advanced AI
hero.title: Automate, innovate, and scale with AI.
hero.description: Tell us about your project and our AI generates a complete solution tailored for you.
demoPrompts: Describe your project to SU AI DEN
I want a chatbot for WhatsApp and website support
I want to automate my ERP reports and send them to Slack
I want an app to schedule appointments and send SMS reminders

services.title: OUR INTELLIGENT SOLUTIONS
services.subtitle: We develop technologies that transform how companies operate, focusing on real and measurable results.

automation.title: INTELLIGENT AUTOMATION
automation.description: Automate repetitive processes, integrate systems, and boost productivity with custom bots designed for your business.
automation.longDescription: We develop automation solutions that eliminate manual tasks, reduce human errors, and significantly increase your company's productivity. We seamlessly integrate all your tools into a continuous workflow.
automation.benefits: Reduce operational costs by up to 40%

ai.title: AI-POWERED SOLUTIONS
ai.description: Advanced chatbots, natural language processing, and content generation powered by the latest AI technologies.
ai.longDescription: We implement cutting-edge artificial intelligence technologies that transform data into valuable insights, automate complex decisions, and elevate your customers' experience to unprecedented levels.
ai.benefits: Increase operational efficiency by up to 60%

custom.title: CUSTOM SYSTEMS
custom.description: Development of SaaS platforms, internal tools, and dashboards tailored to your business's specific needs.
custom.longDescription: We create comprehensive, personalized systems that precisely meet your business requirements, from executive dashboards to complex e-commerce platforms and enterprise management systems.

data.title: DATA + CLOUD
data.description: Data collection, analysis, and visualization powered by AI for valuable insights and informed decision-making.
data.longDescription: We provide comprehensive solutions to collect, process, and visualize data in real-time, enabling your company to make data-driven decisions based on concrete insights rather than intuition.
data.benefits: Get insights up to 5x faster for decision-making

cta.title: Ready to transform your business with truly applicable AI solutions?
cta.subtitle: Schedule a free consultation with our experts and discover how we can create customized solutions for your business's specific challenges.

cases.title: REAL PROJECTS WITH MEASURABLE RESULTS
cases.subtitle: Discover some of the projects we've developed and the concrete, measurable results we've helped our clients achieve.

case1.title: The Future of English
case1.description: Complete AI-powered translation platform that integrates multiple solutions to facilitate learning and document translation across different languages.

case2.title: Lush America Translations
case2.description: We created an innovative platform for translating official and academic documents using cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence, ensuring fast, consistent, and secure translations across multiple languages.

case3.title: Educational Guidance Platform
case3.description: We developed the Matrícula USA platform, a comprehensive solution for international students seeking educational opportunities in the United States, streamlining the entire admission process.

solutions.title: SOLUTIONS WE'VE IMPLEMENTED
solutions.subtitle: Discover the specific technologies and systems we've developed for our clients.

items.title: AI-Powered Chatbots
items.description: Intelligent customer support with natural language processing and WhatsApp integration

items.title: AI Translation Systems
items.description: Advanced document translation with 90%+ accuracy across multiple languages

items.title: Zelle Payment with AI Validation
items.description: Automated payment processing with intelligent fraud detection and validation

items.title: CRM Integration & Automation
items.description: Seamless data flow between systems with automated CRM functionalities

items.title: Document Validation with AI
items.description: Intelligent validation of passports, bank statements, and academic records

items.title: WhatsApp Business Integration
items.description: Complete WhatsApp Business API integration for customer communication

items.title: AI Email Automation
items.description: Automated email responses with AI-powered content generation

items.title: AI Agent Creation
items.description: Custom AI agents for specific business processes and customer interactions

items.title: Chatbot Training Systems
items.description: Advanced training systems to improve chatbot performance and accuracy

advantages.title: Why choose SUAIDEN?
advantages.subtitle: We deliver AI and automation solutions that actually work and generate concrete, measurable results for your business.

advantage1.title: Real AI implementation, not just promises
advantage1.description: We don't just talk about AI—we implement genuine solutions that deliver tangible, measurable results for your business.

advantage2.title: Rapid, iterative development
advantage2.description: Agile methodology with continuous deliveries, enabling you to see results from day one of the project.

advantage3.title: Experienced, multidisciplinary team
advantage3.description: Professional experts in AI, development, and automation, ready to tackle your most complex challenges.

advantage4.title: Ongoing support and evolution
advantage4.description: We provide continuous support and regular updates to ensure your solution grows and evolves with your business.

advantage5.title: Seamless integration with existing tools
advantage5.description: Our solutions integrate flawlessly with your current tools and systems, requiring minimal disruption to your workflow.

comparison.title: SUAIDEN vs alternatives
comparison.subtitle: Compare and understand why we are the right choice for your company.

benefits.title: What your company gains with SUAIDEN

benefit1.title: Immediate productivity
benefit1.description: Quick implementation that starts generating results from the first days of use.

benefit2.title: 24/7 AI service
benefit2.description: Never lose a customer again. Our AI serves at any time without the need for additional staff.

benefit3.title: Data-driven decisions
benefit3.description: Intelligent dashboards that transform data into actionable insights for your business.

benefit4.title: Scalable automation
benefit4.description: Systems that grow with your company, without the need for large additional investments.

benefit5.title: Security and customization
benefit5.description: All the protection your data needs, with solutions exclusively adapted to your business.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Get answers to common questions about our services and how we can help transform your business.

q1.question: Is this real AI technology?
q1.answer: Absolutely. We utilize cutting-edge AI technologies including GPT-4, Claude, and proprietary models. This isn't just marketing—we implement genuine artificial intelligence applications that deliver tangible, measurable results for your business.

q2.question: Not at all. Our solutions are designed to be intuitive and user-friendly, regardless of your technical background. Our expert team handles all the technical aspects, so you can focus on your business goals.

q3.question: What are your pricing options?
q3.answer: Pricing varies based on project complexity and scope. We offer customized plans that align with your company's specific needs and budget. Contact us for a detailed, personalized proposal tailored to your requirements.

q4.question: What's the typical delivery timeline?
q4.answer: Timelines depend on project complexity, but our agile approach enables incremental deliveries starting from the first few weeks. Simple projects typically complete in 2-4 weeks, while more complex solutions may take 2-3 months.

q5.question: Can you automate our existing tools?
q5.answer: Absolutely! One of our core specialties is integrating and automating existing systems. We can seamlessly connect your current tools (CRM, ERP, spreadsheets, etc.) and create automated workflows between them.

footer.description: Innovative solutions in automation, artificial intelligence, and custom software development.

navigate.title: Navigate between stages
navigate.text: Use the mouse to pan the canvas, the wheel to zoom, and click on cards to read details.

consult.title: Request consultation
consult.text: Click "Request Consultation" to schedule a quick call and clarify questions about the project.

export.title: Export and share
export.text: Use "Save PDF" to generate a file with the timeline and flow details.

viewFlow.title: View the project flow
viewFlow.text: Tap "View Flow" to see the generated timeline as connected stages.

posting.heroText: Join an innovative team and help transform the market with cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence solutions.
posting.noJobs: New opportunities coming soon. Stay tuned!

form.title: Application for
form.subtitle: Fill in the information below to apply for the position.
form.internetLabel: Do you have a stable internet connection?
form.contractInfo: This position is not CLT. The contract follows US standards for the state of Arizona (USA), and holidays follow the US calendar. Do you understand and agree to this model?
form.webcamLabel: Do you have a webcam and microphone for daily Zoom meetings?
form.scheduleTitle: IMPORTANT: This position has a 40-hour weekly workload.
form.scheduleInfo: Select all options where you would be available. You will work 7h/day on weekdays and 5h on one weekend day.
form.footer: © 2026 • Remote position with direct contract with US company
form.validationDesc: Please fill in all required fields, including your resume.

success.title: Application
success.description: Your application has been successfully sent to our talent team. Keep an eye on your email and WhatsApp, we'll be in touch soon!

detail.ctaText: Join us to build the future of Artificial Intelligence. Finalize your application now.

desenvolvedor-full-stack.title: Full Stack Developer - Quality Control
desenvolvedor-full-stack.shortDescription: Join the Suaiden team, a company focused on building web applications using Artificial Intelligence.
benefits: Autonomy to propose and implement solutions
requirements: Experience in Full Stack development (Node.js, Vue.js, React, TypeScript, TailwindCSS)
Familiarity with AI tools for agile development (Lovable, Bolt.new, Cursor, MCPs)
Integration with relational and non-relational databases (Supabase)
responsibilities: Act in the development, maintenance, and evolution of the company's systems and projects
Ensure product quality, performing tests and validations before publications and updates
Monitor platform functioning, identifying flaws, bottlenecks, and opportunities for improvement
Actively participate in the structuring and evolution of our SaaS products, focusing on performance, stability, and scalability
Operate and optimize the AI/SDR system, adjusting flows, integrations, and scripts as needed
Act in the commercial area performing initial service (SDR), understanding the client's journey in practice
Identify points of improvement in the sales funnel, proposing adjustments in processes, automations, and integrations
Connect development, marketing, and commercial, ensuring systems are aligned with conversion goals
Strategically contribute ideas for continuous improvement of products, services, and internal processes
workEnvironment: Workload: 40 hours per week (Monday to Saturday / Sunday to Friday)
Daily: Monday to Friday at 1 PM Brazil time
During working hours, it is necessary to remain online with Zoom open and camera on
paymentTerms: Bonuses: By projects and according to the company's growth
Payment: Via PayPal, performed bi-weekly on the 5th and 20th of each month
Contract: Follows US standards for the state of Arizona
Holidays: We follow the US holiday calendar
Paid trial period: 15 days, to evaluate performance and integration with the team
